services_intro: Family dentistry with modern technique. Clean, calm, and built around your comfort.
service_1_desc: Cleanings, exams, and X-rays. The foundation of a healthy smile.
service_2_desc: Whitening, veneers, crowns, and same-day fixes.
service_3_desc: In pain? Call us. We work in emergencies same-day when possible.
review_1_quote: Best dental experience I've had. Everyone was professional and the office was beautiful.
review_2_quote: They explained every step. No surprises, no upsells. Fair pricing.
review_3_quote: Took my whole family. Kids loved it. We're patients for life.
about_paragraph: Concord Dental is built around two ideas: modern dentistry should be calm, and your time matters. Honest pricing, transparent treatment plans, and a team that actually listens.
